steps.title: Identify the capability that resin casting lacks
steps.content: The passage emphasizes that CT can record measurements throughout the entire burrow-building process—a continuous tracking capability. The passage explicitly states this is impossible with resin casting.

steps.title: Determine why resin casting can't measure the same burrow repeatedly
steps.content:
Resin casting destroys the burrow when recovering the model, making multiple measurements of the same burrow impossible.

The other choices cite unrelated constraints: size limits, processing speed, and shape distortion don't prevent you from measuring the same burrow multiple times.

That matches Choice B — it does not allow for multiple castings of the same burrow over time..
